_note: Standalone langgraph.json for the legal-contract-review example. The dir name `legal_review_agent/` matches the package name, so this entry uses canonical package-relative imports (`from .tools import ...` inside graph.py) — no sys.path hacks needed. This file documents the canonical entry point and is used by the standalone Dockerfile (see ../Dockerfile).
